data.name: SourcePathEmpty
data.value: Please select a source file or directory to process.

data.name: SourcePathNotExistFormat
data.value: The selected source path does not exist: {0}

data.name: SourceFileEmpty
data.value: The selected file is empty and cannot be processed.

data.name: SourceDirectoryEmpty
data.value: The selected directory is empty - no files to process.

data.name: SourceAccessDenied
data.value: Access denied to the source path. Please check permissions or run as administrator.

data.name: DestinationDriveNotAccessibleFormat
data.value: The destination drive '{0}' does not exist or is not accessible.

data.name: DestinationAccessDenied
data.value: Access denied to destination path. Please check permissions or run as administrator.

data.name: PasswordRequired
data.value: Please enter a password for encryption/decryption.

data.name: PasswordTooShort
data.value: Password must be at least 8 characters long for security.

data.name: PasswordLeadingTrailingSpaces
data.value: Password should not start or end with spaces.

data.name: PasswordMismatch
data.value: Password and confirmation password do not match. Please check both fields.

data.name: SourceDestinationSameFile
data.value: Source and destination files cannot be the same. Please choose a different destination.

data.name: SourceDestinationSameDirectory
data.value: Source and destination directories cannot be the same. Please choose a different destination.

data.name: DestinationInsideSource
data.value: Destination directory cannot be inside the source directory. This would create a recursive operation.

data.name: SourceInsideDestination
data.value: Source directory cannot be inside the destination directory. Please choose a different path.

data.name: LowDiskSpaceFormat
data.value: Low disk space: Available {0}, estimated need {1}

data.name: LargeOperationFormat
data.value: Large operation: {0} files will be processed. This may take considerable time.

data.name: MediumOperationFormat
data.value: Medium operation: {0} files will be processed.

data.name: DestinationExistingFilesFormat
data.value: Destination contains {0} existing file(s) that may be overwritten.

data.name: WeakPasswordWarning
data.value: Password strength is below recommended level. Consider using a stronger password.

data.name: EmptyPasswordDescription
data.value: Empty password. Please enter a password.

data.name: PasswordLengthNonPositive
data.value: Password length must be greater than 0

data.name: PasswordOptionsNone
data.value: At least one character type must be selected

data.name: NoCharactersAvailable
data.value: No characters available for password generation with the given options

data.name: NoFilesInSourceDirectory
data.value: No files found in the source directory.

data.name: AccessDeniedStoppedFormat
data.value: Operation stopped due to access denied error: {0}

data.name: InsufficientSpaceStoppedFormat
data.value: Operation stopped due to insufficient disk space: {0}

data.name: InvalidPasswordStoppedFormat
data.value: Operation stopped due to invalid password: {0}

data.name: KeyDerivationStoppedFormat
data.value: Operation stopped due to key derivation error: {0}

data.name: AllFilesFailedFormat
data.value: Failed to process any files. Errors: {0}

data.name: ManifestCreateFailedFormat
data.value: Failed to create encrypted manifest at '{0}'.

data.name: ManifestWriteFailedFormat
data.value: Failed to write or encrypt manifest: {0}
